description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped filing cabinet constructed from dark wood with a visible grain texture. The front face features a single metallic bar handle, likely made of brass or brushed metal, which stands out against the wood. The remaining sides are plain, with no additional handles, decorations, or openings, suggesting a minimalist design. The interior is hollow, providing ample space for storing files, documents, or other items. The overall build appears sturdy and functional, suitable for environments where both durability and aesthetics are valued. The finish is matte, giving the cabinet a subdued, professional appearance.
description: A dark wood, open-topped filing cabinet with a single metallic bar handle on the front and a minimalist, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic bar handle centered on the dark wood face.
description_view_1: Side view with plain wood surface and no visible handle or features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a plain wood surface.
description_view_3: Rear view, also plain wood with no handle or distinguishing features.
